CREATE TABLE test_data (value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES ('value1'), ('value2'), ('value3'), ('value1'), ('value4'), ('value5'), ('value6'), ('value7'), ('value8'), ('value9'), ('value10');
SELECT uniqHLL12(value) FROM test_data;
SELECT uniqHLL12(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value LIKE 'value%') AS filtered_data;
SELECT uniqHLL12(value, 'extra_param') FROM test_data;
CREATE TABLE nested_query_data (id UInt32, attributes Array(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO nested_query_data VALUES (1, ['a', 'b']), (2, ['b', 'c']), (3, ['a', 'c', 'd']);
SELECT uniqHLL12(arrayJoin(attributes)) FROM nested_query_data;
SELECT uniqHLL12(value) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_data);
CREATE TABLE join_data_1 (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE join_data_2 (id UInt32, category String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO join_data_1 VALUES (1, 'A'), (2, 'B'), (3, 'A');
INSERT INTO join_data_2 VALUES (1, 'X'), (2, 'Y'), (3, 'X');
SELECT uniqHLL12(j1.value) FROM join_data_1 AS j1 JOIN join_data_2 AS j2 ON j1.id = j2.id WHERE j2.category = 'X';
SELECT uniqHLL12((j1.value, j2.category)) FROM join_data_1 AS j1 JOIN join_data_2 AS j2 ON j1.id = j2.id;
CREATE TABLE high_cardinality_data (id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO high_cardinality_data SELECT number FROM numbers(1000000);
SELECT uniqHLL12(id) FROM high_cardinality_data;
CREATE TABLE complex_type_data (record Tuple(value String, count UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY count;
INSERT INTO complex_type_data VALUES (('value1', 1)), (('value2', 2)), (('value3', 1)), (('value1', 3));
SELECT uniqHLL12(record) FROM complex_type_data;
